title: WatchConfig path/published: String instead of PathBuf
description:
LOCATION: src/config.rs:49-55, src/watch.rs:18-19

FINDING: WatchConfig.path and WatchConfig.published are String fields that are immediately converted to PathBuf via PathBuf::from(&config.path) in watch_loop. The validation in Config::validate() manually calls Path::new() and checks is_absolute(), then discards the result. Callers re-parse the strings. PathBuf implements Deserialize and would express the intent directly.

IMPACT: Double-parsing on every server start; the Path::new allocation in validate() is thrown away; a future caller that forgets the is_absolute check has no type-system guard.
close_reason: Deferred: WatchConfig String→PathBuf. Low impact, works as-is.
